programme.desc: Blanche's latest boyfriend is a charming Cuban who sweeps her off her feet, but she's not the only one when Blanche discovers he's been dating Sophia behind her back.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Days and Nights of Sophia Petrillo
programme.desc: Sophia organizes a band to raise money, volunteers at the hospital and battles return policies at the supermarket.

programme.title: Movie: A Novel Romance
programme.desc: A best-selling novelist writing under a pen name moves to Portland and unknowingly falls in love with the biggest critic of his latest book. When true identities are revealed, both must take a leap of faith.

programme.title: Movie: Bound and Babysitting
programme.desc: A woman is forced to baby-sit with her college nemesis and begins to see him in a new light.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love
programme.desc: A romance novelist worries she's lost her touch after a string of unsuccessful events. She sets her new book around a Navy Seal hero and dives into research with a retired Seal who teaches her skills she didn't know she had.

programme.title: Movie: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they bond in the kitchen.

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)
programme.desc: A freak accident leaves the Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff, and it's up to Ms. Crabtree to find help. While they wait, the kids reflect on their adventures and how they got out of so many 'sticky situations.'

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: Cow Days
programme.desc: South Park's 14th Annual Cow Days rodeo and carnival is here and the boys are determined to win Terrance and Phillip dolls. Meanwhile, someone has stolen the Cow Memorial statue, and newcomers Tom and Mary are blamed for the theft.

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: The boys set up the 'Awesome Talent Agency' and pool all their resources to impress their first client only to have an agency run by the Chinese Mafia steal her away.

programme.title: South Park: The Poor Kid
programme.desc: Kenny ends up in the foster care system after his parents are arrested.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman form their own boy band, 'Fingerbang,' and search for a fifth member. It is also Carman's latest scheme to make a million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every 'missing child' milk carton in the country. Cartman then sees the funniest thing ever and breaks his funny bone, losing his sense of humour.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: August 21, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Believing that people who are born disabled are better than those who are disabled through an accident, Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the 'Crips.'

programme.title: South Park: Dances With Smurfs
programme.desc: Cartman is chosen to do the morning announcements at South Park Elementary.

programme.title: South Park: Bass to Mouth
programme.desc: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: August 21, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Unfulfilled
programme.desc: South Park is chosen to be the home for Amazon's newest Fulfilment Centre.

programme.title: South Park: Bike Parade
programme.desc: The boys' chance of winning the Bike Parade is in jeopardy when Kenny quits.

programme.title: South Park: White People Renovating Houses
programme.desc: Randy comes to grips with what it means to be white in today's society.

programme.title: South Park: The City Part of Town
programme.desc: The town of South Park is gentrifying and Kenny thinks it's time to get a job.

programme.title: South Park: The Last of the Meheecans
programme.desc: Cartman joins the U.S. Border Patrol.

programme.title: South Park: The Problem with a Poo
programme.desc: Mr. Hankey's offensive behaviour puts him in jeopardy of being fired as the director of the annual Christmas pageant. Meanwhile at South Park Elementary, Strong Woman and PC Principal face a whole new set of challenges in their relationship.

programme.title: The Office: The Deposition
programme.desc: Michael finds himself between a rock and a hard place when Jan sues Dunder Mifflin and Michael is deposed as a witness.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Talbott and Broider
programme.desc: A passive mother who has no problem allowing her three boys to rule the house with slap fights and pranks swap places with a militaristic mom who has rules for everything and everyone. She even makes her sons sign out the key to the bathroom.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: The Honeymoon is Over
programme.desc: Our five couples who were married at first sight return from their honeymoon and move into their new homes together but it doesn't take long for reality to set in. Now the real work begins.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Unfiltered: Honeymoon Baby
programme.desc: Bennett, Woody and Karen sit down with host Jamie Otis to unpack the move-ins and discuss some surprising information that was revealed to Pastor Cal.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: You Can Get Out of This
programme.desc: Heading into their second week of marriage, five couples adjust to daily life together while also seeking the advice of friends and family they haven't seen since marrying their stranger spouses.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Birthdays, Babies, and Blowups
programme.desc: Rodney finally caves to Desiry's demands and introduces her to his parents. However, Desiry quickly learns that some secrets may be better left in the closet.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Couples' Cam: Parting Ways
programme.desc: Shawniece and Jephte take some time apart, Danielle and Bobby experience a heartbreaking tragedy, Jamie and Beth get tested for Covid-19, Steph travels to Aruba without AJ, and Anthony goes to war. With a pillow.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act
programme.desc: Experts empower women to seek personal and professional growth while managing a career, family and home.

programme.title: The Closer: An Ugly Game
programme.desc: The routine arrest of a crack addict exposes a questionable rehab facility and leads Brenda and her squad on a race to find a missing young woman. The case leads Fritz to reveal to Brenda some ugly truths about her past.

programme.title: The Closer: Unknown Trouble
programme.desc: A murder investigation leads the team to the owner of a music label; Brenda is sued.

programme.title: The Closer: Repeat Offender
programme.desc: Brenda and her team investigate the murder of a young girl who was house-sitting.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Foot Loose
programme.desc: When a severed human foot washes up on shore, the squad is called in to identify the victim and track down the murderer as more body parts are found. Meanwhile, Angela helps out Korsak at the Dirty Robber.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Gumshoe
programme.desc: The squad must work together with a private investigator when a clothing designer is found poisoned and his wife reported missing. Jane asks Maura to teach Angela to better handle her finances.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: In Plain View
programme.desc: Jane and the squad team up with another detective who believes they are both hunting for the same killer. Meanwhile, after discovering her identity has been stolen, Maura enlists the help of Angela to find the culprit.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Rise Up
programme.desc: The Chief announces that a solo surgery will be awarded sending the residents into a competitive frenzy; Derek turns to Bailey for advice and Erica discovers a shocking connection between one of her surgical residents and a long-time patient.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: One of Meredith's oldest friends becomes an intern at Seattle Grace but Meredith's friends are less than welcoming. Lexie leads her fellow interns in secretive, unorthodox surgical training sessions and a new surgeon brings order to the OR.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: In the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Meredith, Cristina and Bailey come to Lexie and Sadie's rescue when a routine surgery goes horribly wrong. While Owen and Derek treat a man who was seriously injured during a sleepwalking episode, Mark comforts the sleepwalker's distraught daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Hell In the Heartland: What Happened to Ashley and Lauria: The Fire
programme.desc: On the night of December 30, 1999 a fire rips through the Freeman family home. Four people are in the house that night, but only two bodies are found. Investigators discover that there's much more to the story than they first thought.

programme.title: Hell In the Heartland: What Happened to Ashley and Lauria: The Suspects
programme.desc: After digging into the 1999 murders, Jax and Sarah discover that this story is more complicated than it appears. Exploring all possible leads, they find a string of serial murderers and drug kingpins that may have had a hand in this case.

programme.title: Hell In the Heartland: What Happened to Ashley and Lauria: The Dig
programme.desc: With new info about the location of the girls’ possibly buried bodies, Jax and Sarah prepare for a dig that could finally provide the answers.

programme.title: Hell In the Heartland: What Happened to Ashley and Lauria: The Arrest
programme.desc: After a new Sheriff takes over the investigation, the case is blown wide open when he discovers a box of evidence that leads to what the families have been waiting years for; an arrest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Brother XII
programme.desc: Josh Gates attempts to uncover a treasure left behind by the Aquarian Foundation, an isolated, insidious cult led by the notorious leader known as Brother XII.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: No Fear of Heists
programme.desc: Josh is putting together a crack crew who knows how to pull off a great heist movie. Josh's rogues' gallery of screen bandits includes Elliott Gould of Ocean's 11, Kevin Pollak from The Usual Suspects and Narcos' Luis Guzman.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Exploding Red Ball
programme.desc: A tattooed trainer flexes her muscles against a martial arts master. A benchwarmer in search of a comeback takes aim at a sporty single mom. With $25,000 on the line, only the strong survive The Thunderdome.

programme.title: Growing Belushi: The Weed Brothers
programme.desc: After losing the seeds of two prized Colombian strains, Jim and Chris are back at square one. The cousins explore Pablo Escobar's old haunts while trying to salvage their trip. Back home, they celebrate the harvest of Jim's strains with a big party.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: The Holiest of Grails
programme.desc: Finding the actual Holy Grail is the holy grail for all global investigators, so Rob's on the case. He's following in the footsteps of the Knights Templars and unearthing new evidence that could prove the grail has been hidden in Scotland all this time.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: No Fear of Heists
programme.desc: Josh is putting together a crack crew who knows how to pull off a great heist movie. Josh's rogues' gallery of screen bandits includes Elliott Gould of Ocean's 11, Kevin Pollak from The Usual Suspects and Narcos' Luis Guzman.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Exploding Red Ball
programme.desc: A tattooed trainer flexes her muscles against a martial arts master. A benchwarmer in search of a comeback takes aim at a sporty single mom. With $25,000 on the line, only the strong survive The Thunderdome.

programme.title: Growing Belushi: The Weed Brothers
programme.desc: After losing the seeds of two prized Colombian strains, Jim and Chris are back at square one. The cousins explore Pablo Escobar's old haunts while trying to salvage their trip. Back home, they celebrate the harvest of Jim's strains with a big party.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: The Holiest of Grails
programme.desc: Finding the actual Holy Grail is the holy grail for all global investigators, so Rob's on the case. He's following in the footsteps of the Knights Templars and unearthing new evidence that could prove the grail has been hidden in Scotland all this time.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska
programme.desc: The Perrins brothers are building an extremely remote log hunting cabin in the heart of the Alaskan Range, in the deep wilderness of Sheep Lake. They have just two weeks to construct an entire single-story cabin.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Entering Wild, Wild Country
programme.desc: Leaving comfortable lives behind, strangers journey to Alaska chasing dreams of an off-grid community. With only 100 days until winter, it's a race against nature. They immediately set off to hunt moose, but struggle against the elements and each other.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Rogue Rage
programme.desc: The newly-formed group desperately hunts for moose. When Oliver refuses to go along with the plan and is an obstacle in the line of fire, Andrew pushes back. Army veteran Adam arrives at base camp and immediately tackles critical building projects.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Cold Hard Lockdown
programme.desc: The intense winter has frozen the water supply on the homestead, forcing Marty to hunt for a new water source. In Hawaii, Matt and his wife Katie self-film a lesson in Cacao harvesting on her family's plantation.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Drowning
programme.desc: The Raneys must save two Hawaiian homesteaders who built their dream homestead in the path of life-threatening flash floods. As the weather closes in, the Raneys must battle to save a homestead from drowning and also win the trust of the homesteaders.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Schenee's Story
programme.desc: Devastated by two miscarriages due to her weight, Schenee is desperate to start a family.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Zsalynn's Story
programme.desc: Zsaylnn, once known as the 'Fat Girl Rock Star,' married a man who loves large women. Now weighing over 600 lbs., she urgently needs to lose weight to be the mother her daughter deserves.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Pauline's Story
programme.desc: At nearly 700 lbs., 51-year-old Pauline has an addiction to food that is killing her and taking over the life of her son, who is the primary caretaker.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Alicia's Story
programme.desc: A devoted girlfriend and loving aunt, Alicia is all smiles and laughter on the outside, but on the inside she is terrified that her addiction to food will kill her before she can marry her long-time love or watch her nieces grow up.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Alicia and Pauline
programme.desc: Alicia's relationship with her boyfriend Tim comes under the microscope in the second year of her weight-loss journey. Then, Pauline is forced to beg her way back into the program after quitting in a huff when her last-weigh in did not go well.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: The Misery Index: This Is Not a Drill!
programme.desc: Contestants trash talk the Tenderloins, Sal's 'moist moment,' and a giant door-opening python.

programme.title: The Misery Index: The Grandma's Special
programme.desc: They may be senior citizens but these awesome ladies sure have lived! Find out what happens when a young bull charges you, and what bodily function made a girl lose 10 years of memories.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 15
programme.desc: Featuring twenty of the most talent less performers yet. Performances include a man in a toast topping to a death scene that takes too long to die.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16
programme.desc: Twenty of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo, and a guy famous for smoking weed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrong Playwright

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: The guys get sassy while posing as auto parts salesmen, then head to the mall where they try to reel in unsuspecting shoppers. Tonight's big loser is stuck in a horrible mess after being locked inside a rigged bathroom of horrors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Universal Appeal
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe invade Orlando. The guys are out of line managing a ride at a theme park, get all wet on a river adventure, and man the (mis)information booth. Plus, tonight's loser goes from spider hero to barnyard zero.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Worst Day of My Life

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: A Daughter Finds Her Groove
programme.desc: Robert Irvine travels to Muncie, Ind., where the rundown Madison Street Retro Diner is in dire straits. Owner Rita Watkins is in charge of the place, but her health is failing, and her daughter, Melissa, can't seem to step up to the plate and take over.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: New Roles, New Results
programme.desc: Robert comes to the rescue of Foxfire Grill in Alexandria, Virginia, where the owners, Terri and Jackie, simply can't figure out why they aren't making money. The restaurant has a good location, the owners are smart and they work hard.

programme.title: Chopped: Wild Ride
programme.desc: Fun at the carnival is the theme for this special Chopped competition. In a sign of what's to come, the chefs open the first basket to find that two out of the four ingredients are deep-fried.

programme.title: Chopped: Grandma vs. Grandma
programme.desc: For the first time, four determined grannies face off in the Chopped Kitchen. In the appetizer basket, they find a favourite grandma leftover: a coffee can of bacon grease.

programme.title: Chopped: An Ugly Turn
programme.desc: The chefs are encouraged to embrace beautiful imperfections as they work with so-called ugly ingredients. In the appetizer round, they find often-discarded seafood and misshapen veggies in the baskets.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Toast the Competition
programme.desc: It's a great day for grocery shoppers at Ralph's in Glendale, Calif., as four chefs pay big for those bags. First there's a burrito battle, and then it's a stakeout that'll make Grandma proud. It all comes down to the last chefs standing, and one's toast.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Trouble in Triple Decker
programme.desc: Four chefs are handing out cash to shoppers in Glendale, CA as they compete to make the best barbecue dish. Then the chefs are seeing triple as they cook up a tasty triple decker.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Burger Night Bonanza
programme.desc: It's burger night in the parking lot of Bristol Farms Calabasas, CA where four chefs try to craft the perfect one...with or without the meat and bun. Then it's time to serve up some southern charm before the final two chefs make their best midnight snack.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby's DMV Appointment
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff and Food Network's Curtis Stone aim to knock their friend Bobby Flay down a couple of pegs. Washington D.C. veteran Todd Gray and Maryland's French-trained Gabonese caterer Serge Pambo go head to head.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: East vs. West

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo
programme.desc: When Carrie learns that Deacon and Kelly bought a second home, she convinces Doug that they were able to afford it because they are so cheap.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mild Bunch
programme.desc: A prank runs amok when Doug and his pal reunite at their 20th high school reunion and decide to have some fun with their old principal.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Manhattan Project
programme.desc: When an apartment becomes available in Manhattan, Carrie finally sees her dream of living in the city coming true but Doug has different plans and the two quickly realize they share a different outlook on the future.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Cowboy Country
programme.desc: When Adam passes on a family ring to convey his feelings for Dana, Beverly can't seem to accept her little boy having such deep feelings at his age. Meanwhile, new couple Lainey and Barry convince Murray to watch football with Lainey's dad.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Van People
programme.desc: When Murray takes Erica's car privileges away, Erica and Barry retaliate by buying their own shabby used black van. Murray gets even more upset so they move into the van full time and park it on the street by the house.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: What Happens in Vegas Is Disgusting in Vegas
programme.desc: Typically tightened-up New Christine loses all her inhibitions at a spur-of-the-moment bachelorette party Christine and Barb throw for her in Vegas.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Honey, I Ran Over the Kid
programme.desc: Christine accuses Richard of bad parenting when Ritchie gets hurt at a skateboarding party. She soon surpasses him as the worse parent when her over-protectiveness backfires.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deceived
programme.desc: Game wardens attempt to catch a running deer before it hurts itself. The wardens investigate an impersonation case in which a man claims to be one of their own. While patrolling Lake Tawakoni, Richards comes across a suspicious group.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: High Desert Drama
programme.desc: The Game Wardens are busy on land and water. In Hunt County, residents are concerned about alleged wolves being kept as pets. Rehabilitated turtles are released on the high seas. In West Texas, wild donkeys are under threat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wet and Wild
programme.desc: A hot summer weekend in Texas keeps wardens busy on the water. A festival attracts thousands of people to float the San Marcos River. Patrol on Lake Texoma leads to multiple arrests. A fisherman is questioned when he can't provide identification.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Painted Turtle Mystery
programme.desc: Officers struggle to convince a woman to relinquish a wild squirrel, and Officer DeLisle investigates the mysterious deaths of more than twenty painted turtles. Then, Trainee Frye reveals his skills when handling his first lobster trap detail.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Room for Error
programme.desc: Officer Lopashanski makes a surprising discovery while searching an island for an injured bald eagle. Officers Cheney and Pushee stumble upon a trespasser whose vehicle is stuck in a mud hole. Officer MacFadzen leads the search for a missing swimmer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Boaters, Floaters and the Wildlife
programme.desc: Wardens prepare to patrol for violations on the San Marcos River, and an intoxicated man is found roaming a small island on Lake Texoma. Then, a bobcat makes a residential garage its home, while investigations begin for multiple illegal deer kills.

programme.title: North Woods Law: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: The entire warden service pulls together for a massive search effort for a missing boy. A second search for a lost hiker stretches the wardens to their limit. A pair of salmon poachers are caught in the act and a new K-9 is trained.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Night and Day
programme.desc: The wardens work around the clock to handle turkey hunting season and smelt runs. A search warrant is needed upon the discovery of poached turkeys. The wardens come across many animals including orphaned baby foxes, nuisance beavers and a python.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens go undercover to stop a black market for buying and selling wild animals. A trio of Wardens work the beaches of Galveston and mobilize when an oil spill threatens wildlife. A robotic deer decoy is used to catch night hunters.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deceived
programme.desc: Game wardens attempt to catch a running deer before it hurts itself. The wardens investigate an impersonation case in which a man claims to be one of their own. While patrolling Lake Tawakoni, Richards comes across a suspicious group.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Payback Time
programme.desc: It's the start of the 2009 opilio crab season, and anything the Bering Sea held back during king crab season is now being paid out in spades. The skippers have their eyes on the oncoming ice pack, but it's a lethal, 40-foot rogue wave that's on the hunt

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: No Second Chances
programme.desc: The fleet arrives on the Opi Grounds, but they struggle to hunt down crab while facing ice, big seas, and bad information. A skipper regrets sending his men out in savage weather to save his boat, but there are no second chances on the Bering Sea.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Sea of Misery
programme.desc: It's week three of the Opilio Crab Season, and the long hours and miserable conditions already have the crabbers turning on each other and boat-crushing ice stands between one skipper and the safety of harbour.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Lockout
programme.desc: After weeks of battling freezing spray, forty-foot waves, and sub-zero temperatures, skippers begin plugging their boats with Opilio crab. But as they race to St. Paul harbour for offload, a 250,000 square mile arctic ice pack stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Slap in the Face or a Kick in the Butt
programme.desc: Halfway through the season, each skipper faces a personal form of hell. Frozen crab, frozen gear and a frozen harbour chill the hearts of the most callous fishermen. On the Northwestern, Sig battles a fierce cigarette addiction and a fierce storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: When the fleet gets word of great fishing by the ice pack, the chase is on to the ends of the earth. However a journey to the far north push these men over the edge.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bitter Tears
programme.desc: Weeks into the Opilio's season, the fleet is bone tired and desperate for home. As delirium sets in, deadly rib-crunching mistakes are made and for one fisherman, a tragedy on land spells gut-wrenching heartbreak at sea.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: The Opilio season is almost over, but an arctic storm front has the skippers on edge. The boats race to plug their tanks with crabs and get back to port unscathed but on the first boat to finish, a tight-knit crew fractures.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Shipwrecked
programme.desc: It's the final 24 hours of the 2009 Opilio crab season and a savage arctic storm causes multiple vessels to send out maydays. The Coast Guard is in a race against the clock to save four men before their boat is pounded into splinters against jagged rocks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Gamble
programme.desc: With crews are limited to half of last years catch, skippers must decide what type of crab to go for.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Turf War
programme.desc: With the fleet split, a tale of two fisheries emerges. On the Blue grounds, a bet has the boats jockeying for position. On the Red grounds, a returning veteran proves his worth while another boat copes with a fallen deckhand.

programme.desc: A couple and their newborn daughter look to settle down and buy a home in Bentonville, Arkansas.

programme.desc: After years of daydreaming, a family is ready to ditch the cold Massachusetts winters for a tropical Roatan, Honduras. She's looking for a private, standalone house with a pool, but he wants a beachfront condo with no maintenance.

programme.title: House Hunters: Winning in Aberdeen
programme.desc: A college basketball coach and his family are relocating to Aberdeen, South Dakota, and are pressed to find a house quickly. Tensions rise as she hopes for a fixer-upper and he wants a turnkey ready home so he can focus on coaching.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Bargaining in Bratislava
programme.desc: A young professional longing for a European experience follows her job to Bratislava, Slovakia. Taking a reduced salary, however, may force her to skimp on her new apartment to take advantage of regional travel.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Bachelor Pad Condo to Family-Friendly Home
programme.desc: Tired of squeezing into his bachelor pad condo and ready to move to the suburbs, Erin and Adam are searching for the perfect family-friendly home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Ready for Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Jaeme, Bliss and their two little ones have been crashing with friends in the big city since Jaeme landed his dream job. They need their own place fast, but their wishlist is too long, and Bliss feels like they left their dream house behind.

programme.title: House Hunters: Midcentury Perfection in Palm Springs
programme.desc: A perfectionist lawyer is looking for a vacation home in Palm Springs. She wants mid-century modern with all the bells and whistles. After three years of looking her friend and her agent want her to decide before she gets priced out of this hot market.

programme.title: House Hunters: Calling the Shots in Arizona
programme.desc: A couple expecting their third child is on the hunt for a bigger home in Arizona before the baby arrives. However, she's a self-proclaimed 'helicopter mom' and isn't willing to compromise on anything, even with the baby on its way.

programme.title: House Hunters International: From Stability to Prague
programme.desc: A career-driven man discovers a new outlook on life after his father's passing but finds it hard to accept the degree of change his adventurous girlfriend has in mind. She won't settle for less than full immersion while he searches for space.

programme.title: House Hunters: Year-round Christmas in Chicago
programme.desc: First time buyers in Chicago can't agree on whether to go for a standalone home that has the vintage details she wants, or a modern townhouse that gives him the tight knit community he remembers from his childhood.

programme.title: House Hunters: Back From Abroad
programme.desc: A married couple want to move back to America after living in Europe for several years. He wants a smaller home in a walkable neighborhood but she's hoping to purchase a big, American two-story home.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Adventures in Noosa Hinterland
programme.desc: A freelance outdoor instructor wants to start an adventure business in Australia and, temped by the promise of days in the sun with their two children, his wife is onboard.

programme.title: House Hunters: New Digs in Nashville
programme.desc: Eric Malo's new job offer has him and his wife Alysha packing up in Chicago and heading back to Nashville where they're orginally from. The Malos want to find a house with more room than they have now

programme.title: House Hunters: A Place for My Daughter in Virginia
programme.desc: A buyer wants to upgrade from his small rental in Norfolk, Virginia, to a home with a room for his young daughter, and a pool table. But along on the hunt is his future roommate and best friend, who has his own priorities in mind.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Container Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to plant a variety of container gardens, like evergreen, succulent, summer and herb gardens, with her gardener Ryan McCallister. She also calls her good friend, Snoop Dogg, who wants to know how to plants 'herbs' in containers.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Trees

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Perennial Garden
programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to build a perennial flower border with the help of her gardener, Ryan McCallister. She also makes a call to her long-time friend, Richard Gere, who wants to know how to plant a perennial garden for all seasons.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Vegetable Garden
programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to plant a vegetable garden with her head gardener, Ryan McCallister, and takes a call from her friend, Antoni Porowski of Queer Eye, who needs her advice on growing vegetables on his NYC balcony.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Paths
programme.desc: Martha Stewart builds a stone pathway that leads to her peacocks, getting help from the foreman of her outdoor grounds crew. Actress Lupita Nyong'o calls Martha for advice on how to arrange fresh flowers and what flowers are good for beginner gardeners.

programme.title: Martha Knows Best: Pets
programme.desc: Martha Stewart shows how to make a backyard fence similar to her own dog run and dog breeder Ari Katz weighs in. Hailey Bieber gave her dog a trim and needs Martha's advice on how to fix it. Designer Zac Posen asks what vegetables he can give to his dog.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Unforgivable

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Sex, Lies and Text Messages

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Never Before Scene 1016

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Reunion Part 1

programme.title: Race in America: A Movement Not a Moment
programme.desc: Ten outspoken Bravo celebrities share their perspectives on race relations today and how we can move forward with hope. Topics include the racial inequality, the value of allies, 'Karens' and their privilege and the role of voting to change the system.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Just the Sip
programme.desc: Leah continues to have issues with her mother and Tinsley gives updates on her dating life. Meanwhile, Sonja realizes that her fashion line isn’t doing as well as she hoped. Luann hosts an anti-bullying comedy show that turns into a battle of words.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: How You Like Them Apples?
programme.desc: Tinsley vents to Leah’s boxing coach about her issues with Dorinda, while across town Dorinda confirms to Sonja that she and John are officially on a break. Luann opens up to Leah about her relationship with drinking. The ladies take a day trip.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: If You Can't Take the Heat, Get Out of the Russian Bath House
programme.desc: Stressed out by the tension between the group, Leah arranges a spa day at a Russian bath house. Dorinda and Tinsley call a truce, while Ramona confronts Dorinda about her anger issues. Later, Ramona and Dorinda's disagreement reaches a boiling point.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Hurricane Leah
programme.desc: The ladies head to Newport, Rhode Island for a weekend getaway. Leah invites her sister Sarah to join, which Ramona is not happy about. The drama continues between Tinsley and Dorinda, and Leah loses her cool at the evening clambake.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Something's Brewing
programme.desc: Tinsley hosts a dinner for the group on their last night in Newport. The night begins to spiral once Ramona is distracted by a man at the bar, and the dinner goes off the rails. Donna and Luann co-host a tea party once they return to the city.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Love Him and Leave Them
programme.desc: The ladies celebrate Halloween in the city with a scream-inducing tour of Blood Manor. Tinsley returns from Chicago with a life-changing decision and major relationship update, but soon realizes some of the ladies aren't interested.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Eat, Drink, and Be Scary
programme.desc: Looking for love again, Ramona meets with a matchmaker. Meanwhile, Dorinda and her daughter Hannah discuss Dorinda's recent life struggles, and to mark the end of Halloween week, Luann hosts a voo-doo themed dinner party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Not Feelin' Jovani
programme.desc: Dorinda hosts the women at Blue Stone Manor for a weekend in the Berkshires. Sonja confronts Luann about paying her less than she deserves to perform in her cabaret show, and Dorinda steps in to defend Sonja. Elysa and Ramona discuss their friendship.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Remember Your Blue Stone Manners
programme.desc: After a rosé fueled night, the ladies wake up to find that Luann has left Blue Stone Manor. The women head to town for some much-needed retail therapy and group healing. Later, Dorina throws an elegant dinner party and the mayhem continues.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Sheer Madness
programme.desc: Luann and Sonja attend a meeting at the Fortune Society and spend time with women who have been incarcerated. Ramona reunites with Avery and Mario as a favourite restaurant on the Upper East Side. The ladies attend Remona's birthday bash.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Not Very Merry-achi
programme.desc: Luann hosts a spa day for the women she met through the Fortune Society. Ramona gives Sonja a talking-to over her birthday night antics and gives Leah the cold shoulder. The women head to Cancun, Mexico, where Sonja gets liquored up too soon.

programme.title: Movie: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: With all-out war raging between humans and invading machines from another planet, an inventor teams up with a professor, an English Lord and machine named Bumblebee to find answers in the ancient past as to why the machines keep coming to Earth.

programme.title: Movie: The First Purge
programme.desc: In an attempt to reduce the crime rate, the American government makes all crimes legal for 12 hours in a small city to let people purge their more violent urges, but when the oppressed people become targets they fight back and the violence spreads.

programme.title: Movie: The Purge: Anarchy
programme.desc: Five people meet up and attempt to survive a night in Los Angeles where, as a means of population control, all crime is sanctioned for a span of 12 hours.

programme.title: American Pickers: The Joy of Sax
programme.desc: A garage door in Indiana leads to a 1950s wagon Mike can't leave without- if he can sweeten the deal. And on a musical mission from Dani, the guys scour a farm with more than chickens and pigs.

programme.title: American Pickers: From Coupe to Nuts

programme.title: American Pickers: Signs of Struggle

programme.title: American Pickers: Going Down?

programme.title: American Pickers: Catch-32

programme.desc: Mike and Frank find some dreamy picks while in California, including a sweet classic Ford pick-up.

programme.desc: Remy's plan for his whole life is thrown into question when he is unprepared for a violin recital. Later, Gramma becomes a rideshare driver, only to find her best customers are thieves.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What Happened To The Beauty Queen?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Payson Canyon
programme.desc: Kay Mortensen took pride in preparing for every possible threat, so when he was found dead at home, those who knew him were stunned. The brutal killing put two of Kay's loved ones behind bars and in danger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The fire broke out before dawn. After the smoke cleared, a mother of two young children was found dead. It was the tragic end to a life that held so much promise, but for investigators, it was just the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Toxic
programme.desc: Kevin and Morgan Mengel were happy at first, but when the marriage went bad, he went missing. Police wondered if he simply left, but a family's relentless pursuit lead to a stunning confrontation and, eventually, the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder on Nantucket Island
programme.desc: She was a savvy entrepreneur. He got his start in finance. Their connection was instant but when their summer love cooled, tempers flared and the relationship took a tragic turn. It seemed like an open and shut case but there was a surprise in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Pleasant Grove
programme.desc: The doctor and the model made a stunning couple. Together they built a loving family. Her death was sudden but ruled natural causes. Secrets remained hidden for years. Then, her daughters became amateur detectives to help unlock the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Killing in Cobb County
programme.desc: It is a story of obsession that boiled over into a brutal crime. Right away, one woman said she knew what happened. Yet, it took years to bring the alleged killer to trial and the verdict was far from the end of this case.

programme.title: License to Kill: The Cosmetic Killer

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: The House on Canyon Road
