programme.title: Apocalypse: The Rise of Hitler
programme.desc: A vivid depiction of World War II, featuring rare footage from 1939, including the invasion of Poland and horrifying images from the Lodz Ghetto.

programme.title: Apocalypse: The Rise of Hitler
programme.desc: A vivid depiction of World War II, featuring rare footage from 1939, including the invasion of Poland and horrifying images from the Lodz Ghetto.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.desc: Lisa and Angela are co-workers and friends that are searching for a house on Lake Arrowhead in Georgia. With the help of their daughters Danielle and Allie, they're hoping to find the perfect vacation home to share between their two growing families.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.desc: A couple that's looking for a forever home for their family of four finds a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County, WA.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Old to Bold
programme.desc: Tamara revives a 100-year-old Shirtwaist home while accenting the original woodwork.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Georgia Reno on Their Minds
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiasts John and Heather are looking for a vacation retreat for their family on Lake Oconee in Georgia, and they find a fixer-upper in an ideal setting.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Modern Farmhouse Fix-up
programme.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work. They hope their budget is enough to give them the open floor plan and modern farmhouse look they desire.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Down in Deep Creek, Maryland
programme.desc: A family of six looks for a vacation home on Deep Creek Lake in Maryland. They find the lakefront property of their dreams but it's in need of some major renovations.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Comic Con Cupcakes
programme.desc: Bakers compete for chance to be displayed at Comic-Con's exclusive Masquerade Party.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Ace of Cakes 100th Episode Celebration
programme.desc: Guest judge Duff of Ace of Cakes challenges the bakers with wacky ingredients.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Splatter Up!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the nine young bakers to get creative and colourful. Cakes in assigned flavours like chocolate, red velvet and coconut are splattered with colour.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Desserts to the Rescue!
programme.desc: Valerie and Duff challenge the eight bakers to defend bird island or pig island in this round inspired by the "Angry Birds 2" movie. Each baker makes a dozen cupcakes based on a character from the film, then they team up to build an edible island.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: I Doughnut Know What to Think!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman ask the seven young bakers to make a giant doughnut cake. Using Bundt cake pans, the bakers make a cake in an assigned flavour like strawberry or maple and then decorate it to look like an oversized doughnut.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: International Intrigue
programme.desc: The six young bakers must fake it to make it as Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge them to create imposters that look like international dishes, such as sushi or shish kebab, but taste like dessert.

programme.title: Dessert Games: Welcome to Sweet City
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is letting his buddy Duff Goldman temporarily turn Flavortown Market into Sweet City and invite some of America's best pastry chefs to compete in his diabolical Dessert Games.

programme.desc: Americans continue to pine over all things swine.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Ethnic Eats
programme.desc: Authentic global flavours can be savoured right here in America.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Hot Lunch Spots

programme.title: Unique Eats: Hotlanta
programme.desc: Heirloom Market BBQ in Atlanta brings together Korean and American barbecue in a quirky roadside eatery.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Modern Italian
programme.desc: Parm in New York City's Little Italy dishes out classic Italian-American sandwiches and bring out the kid in all of us.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Grilled
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best grilled dishes in restaurants across America. He's hanging out in the kitchens of fire-loving chefs to learn everything there is to know about applying heat and smoke for the tastiest chicken, beef, and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: West Coast Roasts
programme.desc: Visiting the Passmore Ranch in Sloughhouse, Roger must try to catch a fish by hand. Also, at the Santa Maria Elks Lodge, he will assist in building a fire pit for cooking up some beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Carnivore's Cookout in California
programme.desc: Roger is in central California for two meat-filled cookouts. This region is home to many vineyards, but Paso de Record Vineyard is what catches Roger's interest.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mud and Steel in New Mexico
programme.desc: Roger heads to the heart of New Mexico where cooking with fire is taken to new culinary heights with mud and steel. Roger visits Comida de Campos in Embudo, a farm and cooking school where delicious feasts are cooked in cone-shaped clay ovens.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Small Packages, Big Flavors
programme.desc: Good things come in small packages, and that is especially true when it comes to artisanal food makers. Roger searches the Gulf Sates for tasty food with big flavor.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Global Flavors of Texas
programme.desc: Today, Roger is making his way through Texas for live-fire Latin American cooking and smoked European-style sausages.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Mexican Feast
programme.desc: Roger meets with Chef Johnny Hernandez in San Antonio, Texas and cooks regional Mexican dishes in the ultimate outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.title: Good Eats: Immersion Therapy
programme.desc: The last decade has seen a lot of change in the food world, but no device has made more of a difference than the immersion circulator. Alton Brown makes an argument for having one in every kitchen by featuring dishes such as a perfect rump roast.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Cake on Every Plate: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2003 and reinvents the cake that so many folks complained about way back when. This time, the cake isn't just good: it's golden.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Bar: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this cocktail show from 2006 with a new martini, a new mint julep and perfectly clear ice cubes.

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: One Man Banned/ Frenemy Mine

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Fairy Beginning

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Last Stand

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Day Without Tears/ Summer Job
programme.desc: Squidward bets SpongeBob he can't go a day without crying. Mrs. Puff has to work through her summer at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze

programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions

programme.desc: A showcase of Americana band, Western Youth. In 2018 the band released their first recording in five years that's seen profound life changes and a sublime new band line-up.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: Cactus Cafe: Guy Forsyth and Jeska Bailey
programme.desc: A showcase of artists Guy Forsyth and Jeska Bailey — co-conspirators in life and song. Their music, stripped down to its essence, pairs two incredible voices, augmented only by Forsyth's master string work.

programme.title: Game Changers: Electric Vehicles

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Molly's New Shoes
programme.desc: Molly enjoys a shopping spree at the mall after Mike storms off over a disagreement.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Jim Won't Eat
programme.desc: When Mike's mom, Peggy, needs gallbladder surgery, she shocks Molly by asking her to take care of her dog. Meanwhile, Molly is thrown when Mike starts talking about being buried next to her when he dies.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Mike's Pole
programme.desc: When Mike hangs his prized U.S. flag in the yard, 14-year-old Eve is inspired by her father's patriotism and announces she wants to join the Junior ROTC.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Quarterback Boyfriend
programme.desc: Mike is so impressed with Greg, Mandy's new boyfriend and the high school star quarterback; he offers him a job at the Outdoor Man under Kyle's supervision.

programme.title: Black-ish: Daddy Dre-Care
programme.desc: The flu is going around the Johnson household, and with things in flux at work, Dre tries to avoid catching the bug at all costs. Dre has to step up and take care of the whole family.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Real World
programme.desc: When Bow reconnects with her college friends on Facebook, she invites them over for an elaborate dinner party and tries to impress them. On the night of the party, Dre ends up learning a lot of new information about Bow's past.

programme.title: Masters of Illusion: Cell Phone Hack, Water Torture, and Alonzo's Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Featuring magicians include Naathan Phan, Anna DeGuzman, Richard Turner, Ed Alonzo, Eric Jones and Titou.

programme.title: Masters of Illusion: The Sound of Magic and the Intrusive Rope
programme.desc: Featured magicians include Chipper Lowell, Håkan Berg, Shoot Ogawa, Chris Funk, Nick Dopuch and My Uyên.

programme.title: Being Reuben: Northern Soul
programme.desc: Reuben heads to Blackpool to meet up with fellow makeup artist and reality star Charlotte Dawson. The pair talk about being trolled online and reflect on the difficult side of being in the spotlight.

programme.title: Being Reuben: Reuben Goes Hollywood
programme.desc: It's vacation time and the de Maids are headed to Los Angeles. While Vicky stresses over packing for three kids and Bampa, Reuben realizes it's the perfect opportunity to raise his profile within the LA beauty scene.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Caddy
programme.desc: Kramer befriends a caddy who offers advice on a variety of topics. When George leaves his car at work for several days, his bosses believe he is very dedicated to his work. Elaine's bra-less friend causes a car accident.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Raincoats
programme.desc: Kramer's plans to sell raincoats backfire when a shipment is delayed.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Meander to Your Dander
programme.desc: Charlie coaches Alan in the fine art of breaking up with a woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Don't Give a Monkey a Gun
programme.desc: After they sign their divorce papers, Walden offers Alan the gift of his choice but when Alan chooses something selfish and impractical, it puts his relationship with Lyndsey on the line.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Greatest Musical Ever Written
programme.desc: Barry makes fun of Adam for wanting to be in theatre, but he suddenly becomes jealous when he discovers Adam and Lainey were cast in roles where they kiss each other. Barry joins the stage crew to sabotage the production.

programme.title: Mom: Bad Hand and British Royalty
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie have their hands full when Adam's hard-partying friends come for a visit.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the College Experience
programme.desc: When Caroline and Max are invited to speak about their business at Caroline's alma mater, Max takes the opportunity to give Caroline the college partying experience she never had. Also, Oleg's attempts to bond with baby Barbara are rebuffed by Sophie.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: The Dead Episode
programme.desc: Jason attempts to facilitate a peace meeting between Blue and Malik. Malik tries to track down Keira to apologize. Tasha deals with a life-altering family crisis when her father dies. Brittany surprises her parents with unexpected news.

programme.desc: The Baxters' neighbour Chuck Larabee stops by with his german shepherd, Lady, to let them know that their tiny dog, Muffin, has impregnated his dog. Chuck is very selective about who Lady breeds with because purebred german shepherd puppies are in demand.
